zh.Mortagne-Au-Perche, Orne, Lower Normandy: 法國諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-
zh.Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利莫莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Valois於大約1042年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利時，她的父親Raoul IV de Vexin24歲，母親Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil43歲。她和Lord Roger de Mortimer至少有1個兒子。她去世於1086年之後在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利莫莫。

zh-hans.Mortagne-Au-Perche, Orne, Lower Normandy: 法国諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-
zh-hans.Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利莫莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Valois于大约1042年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利时，她的父亲Raoul IV de Vexin24岁，母亲Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil43岁。她和Lord Roger de Mortimer至少有1个儿子。她去世于1086年之后在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利莫莫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Valois was born about 1042, in Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Raoul IV de Vexin, was 24 and her mother, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, was 43. She had at least 1 son with Lord Roger de Mortimer. She died after 1086, in Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, and was buried in Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Valois est née environ 1042, à Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Raoul IV de Vexin, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lord Roger de Mortimer. Elle est décédée après 1086, à Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, et a été enterrée à Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Valois um 1042 in Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul IV de Vexin 24 und ihre Mutter Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil 43. Sie hatte mit Lord Roger de Mortimer mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1086 in Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Valois è nata il circa 1042 nel Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Raoul IV de Vexin, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lord Roger de Mortimer. Morì dopo il 1086, nel Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, e fu sepolta a Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Valoisが約1042年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで生まれた時，父Raoul IV de Vexinは24歳，母Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuilは43歳であった。彼女はLord Roger de Mortimerとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1086年以後にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメで死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメモーテマーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Valois(이)가 대략 1042년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul IV de Vexin(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Lord Roger de Mortimer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1086년 이후 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀에서 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 모르테머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Valois nasceu aproximadamente 1042, em Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul IV de Vexin, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lord Roger de Mortimer. Ela faleceu após 1086, em Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, e foi sepultada em Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Valois родилась около 1042 г. в местности сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul IV de Vexin было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, 43. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lord Roger de Mortimer. Она умерла после 1086 г. в местности сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция и была похоронена в местности мортемир, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

sm.Abt 1042–after 1086: e tusa o le 1042–ina ua ma'ea le 1086

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Valois nació aproximadamente 1042, en Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul IV de Vexin, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lord Roger de Mortimer. Murió después de 1086, en Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, y fue sepultada en Mortemer, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
